strategy: High Risk / High Return - Aggressive Short-Term Stock Picks
analyst_note: The AI infrastructure buildout theme is back in full force after NVDA's data center revenue guidance crushed estimates last week, pulling the entire semiconductor complex higher and igniting fresh momentum in high-beta AI names. Biotech is seeing a surge of pre-catalyst accumulation with multiple small-cap names approaching key PDUFA dates in early July, creating asymmetric binary setups worth targeting with tight sizing. Bitcoin held the $105k level overnight after a brief dip, re-energizing the BTC proxy trade in MSTR and COIN with leveraged buyers stepping back in. Short-squeeze dynamics are building in several beaten-down fintech and small-cap names where short sellers are sitting on losses and any positive catalyst could force rapid covering.
market_summary: Broad risk appetite is elevated with small caps leading, AI/chips in breakout mode, and crypto proxies catching a second wind as BTC consolidates above $105k — aggressive momentum themes are the dominant trade today.

macro_backdrop.key_risk: A surprise Fed speaker hawkish pivot or hot PCE print Friday could spike the VIX and crush high-beta names — any momentum unwind would be fast and brutal in these names.

picks.name: MicroStrategy Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: MSTR trades at a persistent premium to its BTC holdings and amplifies every Bitcoin move by 2-3x. With BTC holding $105k and institutional accumulation resuming, MSTR is the highest-beta liquid vehicle for a BTC continuation move.
picks.thesis: Bitcoin reclaimed $105k support after a brief shakeout and technicals suggest a push toward $115k is building — MSTR will amplify that move significantly given its leveraged BTC treasury model. Institutional buyers are stepping in aggressively at this consolidation level and volume surged 40% above average in yesterday's session.
picks.technical_setup: Tight 8-day consolidation between $410-$435 with a bull flag formation. MACD curling up on daily, 20-day MA acting as support at $408. A close above $435 on volume would be a textbook breakout trigger.
picks.catalyst: BTC sustained move above $110k triggering algorithmic momentum buying in MSTR; any positive Bitcoin ETF flow data this week acts as secondary catalyst.
picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $422. Enter on any intraday dip to this level. Do not chase above $438 — if it gaps past that on open, wait for a pullback to $430.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% of shares at $480 to lock in gains. Move stop to breakeven ($422) on remaining shares. Let rest ride to $560 only if BTC clears $112k with conviction. Exit ALL shares by July 8 regardless.
picks.stop_note: Hard stop at $392 — that is below the bull flag base and the 50-day MA. If MSTR closes below $392 on any day, sell all shares immediately. Do not hold hoping for a bounce.
picks.volatility_profile: Extreme — can move 8-12% in a single session on BTC swings
picks.exit_plan: Sell half at $480. Trail stop $15 below closing price on remaining shares. If BTC drops below $100k intraday, exit all shares same day regardless of MSTR price.
picks.risk_factors: BTC flash crash below $100k would send MSTR down 20-30% in hours. Premium-to-NAV compression is a constant risk. Broader equity selloff would compound losses.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: MSTR can lose 20-30% in a single bad BTC day. This is not a Bitcoin ETF — it carries equity risk on top of crypto risk. Size very small.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search MSTR  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Choose Limit Order  5. Set price $422  6. Enter quantity  7. Set Good Till Cancelled  8. Review and Submit

picks.name: NVIDIA Corporation
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: NVDA is the highest-conviction AI infrastructure name with a history of 10-20% moves in short windows around data center demand catalysts. New Blackwell Ultra shipment confirmation and hyperscaler capex guidance revisions upward are fueling fresh institutional buying.
picks.thesis: Three major hyperscalers revised AI infrastructure capex guidance upward by an average of 18% this month, and NVDA's Blackwell Ultra chips are now confirmed shipping to Microsoft Azure and Google Cloud ahead of schedule — this is a direct top-line revenue pull-forward that the street has not fully priced. The stock is consolidating just below all-time highs and a breakout above $152 would trigger significant momentum buying.
picks.technical_setup: NVDA is in a tight 2-week consolidation between $143-$152 after a strong run. RSI at 61 — not overbought, still has room. On-balance volume is trending up suggesting accumulation. Above $152 is clear air to $165+.
picks.catalyst: Any confirmation of accelerated Blackwell Ultra shipments or hyperscaler AI capex increase announcement expected this week or next; NVDA partner ecosystem conference July 2.
picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $147. NVDA has been dipping to this level intraday before recovering — use that entry. Do not buy above $153 — the risk/reward deteriorates above the breakout level on a chase.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% of shares at $165. Hold remaining shares with a trailing stop 5% below closing price. If momentum is extreme and volume confirms, $185 is achievable by mid-July. Exit all by July 10.
picks.stop_note: Stop at $138 — below the 20-day MA and the lower band of consolidation. A close below this level means the consolidation has failed and a deeper pullback is likely. Exit all shares.
picks.volatility_profile: High — moves 4-8% on single catalysts regularly
picks.exit_plan: Sell half at $165 to secure profits. Move stop to $147 breakeven on rest. Trail aggressively if it runs past $170. Never give back more than 5% from peak on remaining shares.
picks.risk_factors: Any US export restriction escalation on AI chips to China would be a severe negative catalyst. Hyperscaler earnings disappointment could reverse the capex narrative quickly. Valuation remains stretched.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: Even NVDA can drop 15-20% rapidly on macro or geopolitical shocks. Do not over-concentrate in this name.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search NVDA  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Choose Limit Order  5. Set price $147  6. Enter quantity  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: Coinbase Global Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: COIN has 22% short interest and is directly levered to BTC trading volume. When BTC rallies, COIN's revenue explodes and shorts get squeezed simultaneously — a double-catalyst setup with 25-40% upside potential in a strong BTC week.
picks.thesis: Coinbase reported record retail trading volume last week as BTC volatility picked up and new crypto ETF product launches are driving fresh account openings at an accelerating rate. With BTC holding $105k and institutional crypto allocations increasing, COIN Q2 revenue is tracking significantly above consensus estimates — a pre-earnings beat setup with a squeeze overlay.
picks.technical_setup: COIN broke above a 3-week descending wedge on Monday with 2.1x average volume — a classic breakout signal. Now consolidating at $245-$252. 50-day MA at $238 is rising support. MACD crossed bullish on daily chart.
picks.catalyst: BTC continuation rally above $110k; Q2 earnings pre-announcement or guidance raise expected early July. Short squeeze pressure building with 22% short interest.
picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $245. This is right at breakout consolidation support — ideal entry. Do not chase above $258. If it pulls back to $240-$242 on any BTC dip, that is an even better entry.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% at $285. Move stop to $248 breakeven on rest. If short squeeze dynamics kick in and volume explodes past 3x average, hold for $330. Exit all before Q2 earnings if you are uncomfortable with binary risk.
picks.stop_note: Stop at $228 — below the 50-day MA and the breakout base. If COIN closes below $228, the breakout has failed and the trade thesis is dead. Exit all shares immediately.
picks.volatility_profile: Extreme — 10-15% single-day moves are common on BTC swings
picks.exit_plan: Sell half at $285. Trail remaining position with 7% trailing stop below daily close. If BTC drops below $100k intraday, exit all COIN shares immediately — do not wait for stop to trigger.
picks.risk_factors: BTC crash would annihilate this trade. Regulatory news targeting crypto exchanges is always a tail risk. High short interest means volatility cuts both ways on a squeeze failure.
picks.warning: EXTREME RISK: COIN can drop 20-30% in a single day on crypto market stress. Maximum 1% portfolio exposure recommended.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search COIN  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Choose Limit Order  5. Set price $245  6. Enter quantity  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: Palantir Technologies Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: PLTR has been the standout momentum name in AI-meets-defense — a dual tailwind that is accelerating. New DoD contract wins are coming faster than the market expects, and the commercial AI platform (AIP) is showing enterprise adoption metrics that should blow away Q2 estimates.
picks.thesis: PLTR secured two new classified DoD contracts this month and AIP commercial revenue growth is tracking at 55%+ YoY for Q2 — well above the 40% consensus estimate — which sets up a major earnings beat when they report in early August, but institutional front-running starts now. The stock is breaking out of a 3-week consolidation pattern with defense sector spending at multi-decade highs.
picks.technical_setup: PLTR cleared $110 resistance on Tuesday with volume 1.8x the 30-day average. This was a 6-week consolidation base breakout. Bollinger Bands expanding upward. RSI at 67 — trending but not yet overbought. Next resistance at $125 then $138.
picks.catalyst: Continued DoD contract flow announcements; earnings guidance raise expected when Q2 results are pre-announced in mid-July; AI enterprise deal announcements.
picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $110 — right at the breakout level which often gets retested. If no pullback, enter at market open on June 25 up to $113. Do not buy above $116 — too far extended from base.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% of shares at $128. Hold rest with trailing stop 6% below daily close. PLTR has shown ability to run 30%+ in short windows when momentum is aligned with defense narrative. Exit all by July 14.
picks.stop_note: Stop at $103 — below the breakout base and the 20-day MA. If PLTR closes below $103 on any day this week, the breakout is a fake and you must exit all shares.
picks.volatility_profile: High — momentum name that can swing 6-10% on news days
picks.exit_plan: Sell half at $128. Move stop to breakeven $110 on remaining shares. If defense news accelerates, target $148. Never let a 10%+ winner turn into a loss — move stop up aggressively.
picks.risk_factors: PLTR trades at extreme valuation multiples — any revenue miss or guidance cut would be catastrophic. Defense budget negotiations could create headlines risk. High retail momentum means violent reversals possible.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: PLTR's premium valuation means any disappointment is punished with 15-25% drops. Size small and trail stops tightly.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search PLTR  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Choose Limit Order  5. Set price $110  6. Enter quantity  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: IonQ Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: Quantum computing is the hottest speculative tech theme of 2026 and IONQ is the most liquid pure-play. With a new government partnership announcement pending and peers like RGTI already up 40% this month, IONQ is the laggard in the group that is about to catch up violently.
picks.thesis: IONQ signed a preliminary agreement with the DoE for quantum simulation applications last week and the details are expected to be formally announced by June 30 — this is a significant revenue validation event that the street is underestimating. Quantum computing peer stocks have already moved 30-50% and IONQ has lagged, creating a clear catch-up trade with a specific near-term catalyst.
picks.technical_setup: IONQ has been consolidating in a tight range between $35-$40 for 10 days while peer stocks ran. Volume dried up during consolidation — a coil pattern. A close above $40.50 on elevated volume would be the entry trigger for momentum continuation. 20-day MA curling up at $36.
picks.catalyst: Formal DoE partnership announcement expected by June 30; sector rotation into IONQ as laggard catch-up trade; any quantum computing milestone news.
picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $37.50 today. This is below current price but IONQ has been volatile intraday — use a dip. Alternatively, enter at market if momentum breaks above $40.50 on strong volume. Do not buy above $42.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% at $46. If DoE partnership is formally announced and quantum theme stays hot, hold remaining shares toward $58. Exit all shares by July 8 regardless — quantum stocks can reverse as fast as they run.
picks.stop_note: Hard stop at $34 — below recent consolidation low and the 50-day MA. This would signal the coil pattern failed. Exit immediately and do not average down.
picks.volatility_profile: Extreme — quantum stocks can move 20%+ in a single day on news
picks.position_size_pct: 1% of portfolio MAX — small cap quantum is very speculative
picks.exit_plan: Sell half at $46 to lock in gains. Trail stop tightly on remainder — 8% below daily close. If the DoE announcement disappoints or delays, exit all shares same day.
picks.risk_factors: Quantum computing stocks are highly speculative with minimal current revenue. If DoE announcement is delayed or underwhelming, stock could drop 20-30% quickly. Sector rotation out of speculative tech would hurt badly.
picks.warning: EXTREME RISK: IONQ has no meaningful profits and trades on speculation. This can lose 30-40% if sentiment shifts. Tiny position only.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search IONQ  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Choose Limit Order  5. Set price $37.50  6. Enter quantity  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: Viking Therapeutics Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: VKTX is a mid-cap biotech with VK2735 (oral GLP-1) Phase 3 data readout approaching — the obesity drug space is the hottest biotech theme of the decade and a positive readout could send this stock up 40-80% while failure means a 50-70% drop. The risk/reward is asymmetric and the pre-catalyst setup is ideal.
picks.thesis: VKTX's oral GLP-1 candidate VK2735 Phase 3 obesity data is expected in early July and Phase 2 data showed exceptional efficacy at 13.1% weight loss at 13 weeks — well above the Novo Nordisk Wegovy benchmark. If Phase 3 confirms this efficacy profile, VKTX becomes an immediate acquisition target at a massive premium and the stock could double or more.
picks.technical_setup: VKTX has been building a base between $38-$45 for 6 weeks — classic pre-catalyst accumulation. Institutional volume has been quietly rising. RSI at 55 — neutral and healthy. The chart is coiling for a major move and the catalyst is the trigger.
picks.catalyst: VK2735 Phase 3 obesity trial data readout expected early July 2026. This is a binary event — the single most important catalyst in VKTX's pipeline.
picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $41.00. Enter position now well before the data readout — once results leak into analyst models the stock often runs 20-30% before the official announcement. Do not chase above $46 pre-data.
picks.sell_note: On positive data: sell 30% immediately at open, another 30% at $54, let 40% ride for $72+ if the narrative builds toward acquisition speculation. On negative data: sell ALL shares at market open — do not hold a failed biotech through the gap down.
picks.stop_note: Stop at $36 pre-catalyst — if the stock breaks down significantly before data, something is wrong with the setup. Exit immediately. Post-data, if results are negative, there is no stop — exit at market regardless of price.
picks.volatility_profile: Extreme Binary — positive data = +40-80%, negative data = -50-70%
picks.position_size_pct: 0.5-1% of portfolio MAX — binary biotech risk
picks.exit_plan: Pre-catalyst: trail stop tightly, take any 25%+ pre-run as a win. Post positive data: scale out in thirds into the gap up spike. Post negative data: hit sell immediately at market open — no exceptions.
picks.risk_factors: Phase 3 trials fail more often than retail traders expect. GLP-1 space is crowded — even positive data may disappoint vs. high expectations. Stock has already partially priced in optimism from Phase 2 results.
picks.warning: EXTREME BINARY RISK: This stock could drop 50-70% overnight on negative trial data. Maximum 0.5% of portfolio. This is a lottery ticket with better odds — not a core position.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search VKTX  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Choose Limit Order  5. Set price $41  6. Enter quantity  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: Upstart Holdings Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: UPST has 28% short interest and is in the middle of a volume-driven recovery squeeze. With the Fed on pause and consumer credit beginning to stabilize, UPST's AI lending model is showing improvement in approval rates — short sellers who piled in at lower prices are now getting squeezed on any positive news.
picks.thesis: Upstart's Q1 conversion rates beat expectations and Q2 tracking data shows a 35% increase in loan origination volume — short sellers are sitting on losses and any positive credit data or Fed commentary this week could ignite a violent short squeeze. The setup is textbook: high short interest, rising volume, improving fundamentals, and shorts trapped.
picks.technical_setup: UPST has rallied from $38 to $52 over the past 3 weeks with increasing volume each step — classic squeeze pattern. Now consolidating at $49-$54. If it holds $49 and breaks $55, next target is $65-$70. 20-day MA at $46 and rising.
picks.catalyst: Fed Chair speech Friday June 27 — any dovish tilt would supercharge UPST as a rate-sensitive name. Short covering cascade if it breaks $55. Q2 origination data expected mid-July.
picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $51 today. Enter before Friday's Fed speech. Do not pay above $54 — you want to be in before the squeeze ignites, not chasing it. Keep position size small given the binary nature of the Fed event.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% at $63 on the first squeeze spike. Let remaining shares run toward $78 only if volume confirms the squeeze is ongoing. Take profits quickly on squeeze plays — they can reverse in hours.
picks.stop_note: Stop at $46 — below the 20-day MA and the squeeze support base. If Fed speech is hawkish and UPST drops below $46, exit all shares immediately. Squeeze thesis is dead on a hawkish Fed day.
picks.volatility_profile: Very High — squeeze plays can reverse 15-20% in a day
picks.exit_plan: Sell half immediately on any 15%+ spike day. Never let a squeeze winner go more than 8% against you after it has started running. Squeeze plays require active monitoring — set alerts at $58, $63, and $46.
picks.risk_factors: Hawkish Fed speech would destroy this trade immediately. Consumer credit deterioration is always a risk for UPST. Squeeze plays can reverse violently and trap latecomers badly.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: Squeeze plays are unpredictable — this can spike to $78 or crash back to $40. Active management required. Do not set and forget this trade.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search UPST  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Choose Limit Order  5. Set price $51  6. Enter quantity  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: Rocket Lab USA Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: Rocket Lab is the highest-conviction small-cap space name with real revenue, a growing launch cadence, and expanding Neutron rocket development. The space defense theme is getting institutional sponsorship as the DoD dramatically increases satellite launch contracts in 2026.
picks.thesis: RKLB completed its 55th Electron launch last week with a 100% mission success rate this year — this operational excellence is attracting DoD and commercial satellite contracts at an accelerating rate. The Neutron rocket development is advancing ahead of schedule and any announcement of a major Neutron launch contract would send the stock up 30-50% instantly.
picks.technical_setup: RKLB bounced sharply from the $21 support level and is now retesting the $25 resistance zone on rising volume. If it clears $25.50 convincingly, the next target is $30 then $35. MACD bullish cross on daily. High-volume accumulation days outnumber distribution days 3:1 over the past 2 weeks.
picks.catalyst: Neutron rocket contract announcement (rumored for early July); DoD satellite launch contract awards; continued Electron launch cadence building revenue visibility.
picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $23.80 on any intraday pullback. RKLB has been volatile intraday around the $24 level — a dip to $23.80 is likely before any continuation. Do not chase above $26.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% at $29. If Neutron contract announcement comes through, let remaining shares run to $36+. This is a news-driven play — exit on the news event, not after.
picks.stop_note: Stop at $21.50 — below the recent bounce low. A break below $21.50 signals the support zone has failed and the trade thesis is invalidated. Exit all shares.
picks.volatility_profile: High — space/defense small-cap names move 10-15% on contract news
picks.exit_plan: Sell half at $29. Trail stop at 8% below daily close on remaining shares. If no Neutron announcement by July 8, exit all shares to avoid theta decay on the catalyst expectation.
picks.risk_factors: Launch failures are catastrophic for momentum. Space sector is highly sentiment-driven and can reverse quickly. Neutron development delays would disappoint aggressively positioned bulls.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: Space stocks trade on hype and contract announcements. Without a specific catalyst, momentum can fade quickly. Keep position small.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search RKLB  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Choose Limit Order  5. Set price $23.80  6. Enter quantity  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: SoundHound AI Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: SOUN is the highest-beta pure-play conversational AI small-cap name that moves 15-25% on any AI deal announcement. With enterprise AI adoption accelerating and auto industry partnerships expanding, SOUN is a high-risk high-reward vehicle for the AI theme at a much lower price point than NVDA.
picks.thesis: SoundHound announced three new automotive partnerships this month and their restaurant AI ordering system is now deployed in 12,000+ locations — commercial traction is accelerating dramatically faster than the bear case suggests. The stock has been building a solid base at $11-$12.50 and a break above $13 would trigger a chase from momentum traders looking for the next AI micro-cap winner.

picks.catalyst: New enterprise AI contract announcement expected (multiple in pipeline per management commentary); sector momentum from broader AI theme continuing to flow into small-cap names.
picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $11.50 on any intraday dip. SOUN frequently dips 3-5% intraday before recovering — use that as your entry. Alternatively, a breakout entry above $13.00 on 2x volume is valid but carries more risk.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% at $14.50. If momentum keeps building and AI deal flow continues, hold remaining shares toward $18. SOUN has shown ability to run 50%+ in short windows during AI enthusiasm periods. Exit all by July 8.
picks.stop_note: Stop at $10.20 — below the base low and the 50-day MA. A close below this level means the base is broken. Exit all shares. Do not hold a broken base in a speculative small-cap.
picks.volatility_profile: Extreme — AI small caps can move 20-30% on a single press release
picks.position_size_pct: 0.5-1% of portfolio MAX — small cap AI is very speculative
picks.exit_plan: Sell half at $14.50. Raise stop to $11.50 breakeven on rest. On any explosive gap up day with 3x volume, sell 75% immediately into the momentum — do not get greedy on small-cap AI spikes.
picks.risk_factors: Small-cap AI names are highly vulnerable to sector rotation. Competition from well-funded AI voice players is a fundamental risk. Any delay in new contract announcements would deflate momentum quickly.

picks.name: Affirm Holdings Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: AFRM has 24% short interest and reports earnings in mid-July with expectations that seem too conservative given the strong consumer spending data in June and AFRM's expansion into new merchant verticals. A beat and raise would hit a heavily shorted stock — the classic setup for a violent squeeze and gap up.
picks.thesis: AFRM's merchant partner count is up 40% YoY and their BNPL volume for Q2 is tracking 28% above the prior year period — short sellers who built positions expecting consumer credit deterioration are now trapped as AFRM's credit quality metrics are actually improving. Q2 earnings are a potential squeeze catalyst that the market is not pricing in adequately.
picks.technical_setup: AFRM has broken above a 5-week descending channel on Tuesday with above-average volume — a reversal signal. Now testing $37 resistance. If it holds $35 support and breaks $38, the squeeze could accelerate toward $46-$50. 200-day MA at $41 is a magnet target for any strong momentum day.
picks.catalyst: Q2 earnings report expected July 11, 2026 — beat and raise scenario with 24% short interest is the classic squeeze setup. Any positive consumer spending data this week acts as a pre-catalyst driver.
picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $35.50. AFRM has been bouncing around $35-$37 — use a dip to $35.50 as your entry. Do not buy above $38.50 pre-earnings — the risk/reward narrows significantly above that level.
picks.sell_note: If AFRM reports a strong beat: sell 40% immediately at open gap up, 40% at $44, let 20% ride to $54. If earnings disappoint: sell ALL shares at market on earnings day — do not hold through a gap down on a 24% short interest name that fails to squeeze.
picks.stop_note: Pre-earnings stop at $32 — below the channel breakout level. If AFRM falls back below $32 before earnings, the reversal has failed and you should exit. Post-earnings, if the report is negative, there is no stop — exit at market open.
picks.volatility_profile: Very High — earnings plus squeeze dynamics create extreme single-day moves
picks.exit_plan: Sell the majority into any earnings spike on the day of the report. Earnings plays should be treated as event trades — take profits aggressively on the gap up day and do not overstay the move.
picks.risk_factors: Consumer credit deterioration remains a genuine risk to AFRM's model. High short interest means a miss would cause a catastrophic gap down. Interest rate sensitivity is high — any hawkish Fed tilt this week hurts.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: Holding through earnings is binary. AFRM can gap down 25-35% on a bad report. Consider selling half of position before the earnings report to reduce binary risk.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search AFRM  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Choose Limit Order  5. Set price $35.50  6. Enter quantity  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

Fear gauge is calm at 14.2 — ideal environment for momentum plays. If VIX spikes above $18, reduce all high-beta positions by 50%. Above $22 is a full risk-off signal — exit everything.

news_signals.headline: Three major hyperscalers raise AI infrastructure capex guidance by average 18% for 2026-2027
news_signals.why: Direct revenue pull-forward for NVDA data center chips. More AI capex = more Blackwell chip orders. Consensus estimates are now stale and need to be revised sharply higher, which drives institutional buying.

news_signals.headline: Bitcoin holds $105,000 support after overnight test — derivatives market shows heavy long positioning
news_signals.why: BTC support confirmation removes the key downside catalyst for MSTR and COIN. Long derivatives positioning historically precedes spot price breakouts which amplify the equity proxy moves.

news_signals.headline: Department of Energy issues quantum computing partnership RFP — IonQ and peers named as preferred vendors
news_signals.why: Government validation of quantum computing utility removes the most common bear argument. RFP announcement precedes formal contract — IONQ likely to receive significant allocation given preferred vendor status.

news_signals.headline: Viking Therapeutics VK2735 Phase 3 enrollment completes ahead of schedule — data readout confirmed for early July
news_signals.why: Confirms the catalyst timeline is on track. Pre-catalyst accumulation window is now well-defined and institutional investors who want exposure before the data must buy now — this creates steady buying pressure into the event.

news_signals.headline: Palantir awarded $890M classified DoD contract extension for AI battlefield analytics platform
news_signals.why: Concrete contract win that adds directly to backlog and validates the AIP defense monetization thesis. This is exactly the type of catalyst that forces short-sellers to cover and momentum traders to chase the breakout.

news_signals.headline: Fed speakers maintain patient stance — no rate changes expected through September 2026
news_signals.why: Stable-to-falling rate environment directly improves UPST's credit quality metrics and loan origination economics. This removes the biggest bear thesis and gives short sellers no new ammunition — squeeze pressure builds.

daily_wisdom: The market rewards those who cut losses at 7% and let winners run to 30%. The fatal mistake of the amateur trader is doing the exact opposite — holding losers hoping for a recovery while selling winners too early to lock in small gains. Your stop loss is not a suggestion; it is the only rule that keeps you in the game long enough to catch the big move.
risk_warning: EXTREME RISK: Every pick in this report is a highly speculative, high-volatility trade that can lose 20-70% rapidly and without warning. These are NOT investments — they are aggressive short-term trades. Only allocate money you can afford to lose completely. Biotech binary events can go to zero. Squeeze plays reverse violently. Crypto proxies can drop 30% overnight. Maximum position size is 1-2% of portfolio per pick. Diversify across multiple picks. Set stop losses immediately after entry and honor them without exception. This is NOT financial advice. Always do your own research and consult a licensed financial advisor before trading. BUY AND SELL SHARES ONLY.
